mission: Create a VIP experience that feels like a secret society entrance - dark, mysterious, luxurious, and technologically advanced.

hero.description: Full-screen dark gradient background with abstract geometric overlay. Center-aligned 'Exclusive' content. Floating 3D-style diamond/crown icon.

pricing.description: Cards with 'blur' background, thin gold borders, and glowing 'Subscribe' button.

features.description: 2-column grid of feature cards. Each card has a subtle gradient background and a glowing icon.

vip_hub.description: A dense dashboard layout. Primary tool takes 2x2 space. Secondary stats take 1x1. Scrollable horizontal lists for 'Stories' and 'Marketplace'.
vip_hub.navigation: Tab Bar with Neon Active State

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gray backgrounds. Use tinted blacks (#0A0A10).
Typography must be readable but stylish. Use 'Light' weight for large headings.
Buttons must have a 'pressed' state animation (scale down to 0.98).
Lists must have staggered entrance animations.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
For Web compatibility, ensure styles work on both Mobile and Web (avoid platform-specific properties without checks).
instructions_to_main_agent: Phase 1: Update 'vip/index.tsx' with the new 'Cinematic' design. Use the 'hero_background' image with an overlay.
Phase 2: Refactor 'vip/hub.tsx'. Break down the massive file into smaller components if possible, or organize sections clearly using the 'Bento Grid' layout strategy.
Phase 3: Apply the 'Glassmorphism' style to all cards in the Hub.
Phase 4: Add 'Reanimated' entrance animations to the Hub widgets.
Phase 5: Ensure the 'Gold' and 'Cyan' neon theme is consistent across both pages.
